title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 355.206 - Resignation of member
text:
355.206.  Resignation of member. — A member may resign at any time.  The resignation of a member does not relieve the member from any obligations the member may have to the corporation as a result of obligations incurred or commitments made prior to resignation.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1095) 
Effective 7-01-95
